title: phagnalon helichrysoides subsp. nitidum
intro: Phagnalon helichrysoides subsp. nitidum, also known as the nitid Phagnalon, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It is a shrub-like perennial with yellow flowers that have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Phagnalon helichrysoides subsp. nitidum has been used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
